# HK market needs time to digest massive shares being unlocked, but quality remains solid: KPMG

Irene Chu of KPMG China remains bullish on Hong Kong's IPO market, citing a 500-company pipeline fueled by AI and China’s latest development blueprint. Despite concerns over a massive wave of share lockup expiries, Chu sees no systemic risk, noting that a strategic pivot toward high-growth sectors like robotics and new energy secures a healthy long-term outlook.
